text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 286 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_MONPP_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy - days in other day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 3- 
months) on this tier, when using a mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT
